data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Streamlined navigation to simplify decision-making processes for users, reducing choice overload.
data.technical_spec: Use of minimalistic design elements and clear, concise navigation paths.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Design considerations for user interface elements ensure they're easily clickable and accessible.
data.technical_spec: Appropriate sizing and spacing of clickable elements in the website's UI.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Design employs principles like proximity and similarity to improve content organization and readability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent spacing, typography styles, and alignment practices.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Familiarity is maintained by using standard web conventions for navigation and layout.
data.technical_spec: Standardized iconography, search functionalities, and breadcrumb navigation.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information is presented in small, manageable chunks to enhance user memory retention.
data.technical_spec: Use of concise paragraphs, bulleted lists, and highlighted text.
